main_hypothesis.justification: Anchor 'sílice scaling etapa 2 + dosis insuficiente tras recovery 75→82' literal.

recommended_action.justification: Reducir recovery 75% + CIP modificada pH 12.0 90 min + recalcular antiincrustante 12 ppm — match gold.

requested_data.justification: Pide SI sílice en concentrate o análisis directo — match accepted.

decision_change_condition.justification: Single threshold: SEM/EDX no sílice + alta orgánico → biofouling. Single pero específico.
